MOTION Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Apr-27-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jerry Threet, Deputy city Attorney, for plaintiff and moving party: City and County of San Francisco and People of the State of California

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff City and County of San Francisco's motion to compel responses to request for production of documents (set #2) and special interrogatories (set #2) is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendants are ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $300 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

(Administrative fee) is heard this day. Defendant's Counsel is sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 5/24/2007 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Floyd L. Butler, CSR#2518. (212)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Defts Chiu Ki Luk'S And Teresa C. Luk'S Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Request For Production Of Documents; And For An Order Establishing Admissions; And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-20-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Neli Palma for plaintiff and moving party: City and County of San Francisco

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff City and County of San Francisco's motion to compel defendants Chiu Ki Luk and Teresa Luk's responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents and for an order to deem certain matters admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. The matters set forth in plaintiff's requests for admissions are deemed admitted. Defendants are ordered to serve complete verified responses and to produce documents within 21 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond to discovery was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $450 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
